subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the Point in the land of joy, and all, at His bidding, are filled with wonder. Say: Verily, the Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی قد انزل النقطه فی ارض السرور و الکل بامره یعجبون قل انما الحق
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
